creator: glewis@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 158367
Patch

Restrict the build of math/jakarta-commons-math to Java 6 and 7 since it fails to build with Java 8.

http://package18.nyi.freebsd.org/data/101amd64-default-PR199591/2015-04-22_19h31m00s/logs/errors/jakarta-commons-math-2.2_1.log

Alternatively, consider removing the port.  There is a newer version of it in the tree and nothing depends on it.
